nasb.text: He was honored among the thirty, but he did not attain to the three. And David appointed him over his guard.

esv.text: He was renowned among the thirty, but he did not attain to the three. And David set him over his bodyguard.

cnv.text: 他的榮譽比那“三十勇士”高，不過，卻不及“三勇士”。大衛立他作侍衛長。

ccb.text: 他比三十勇士更有声望，只是不及前三位勇士。大卫封他为护卫长。
